Title: Nerdbank.MessagePack has Inefficient CPU Computation
Description: Applications that call `OptionalConverters.WithExpandoObjectConverter` and deserialize untrusted data are open to a vulnerability by which an attacker can exploit a `O(n²)` algorithm to burn an inordinate amount of CPU effort by adding a great many properties to an `ExpandoObject`, whose `Add` method is implemented as an `O(n)` algorithm.
